items.briefing:
Microsoft has released a record-breaking set of security updates this month, patching a large number of vulnerabilities — including some already being actively exploited. All Australian staff should ensure their Windows devices and Microsoft applications are updated as soon as possible. Separately, the Australian Government has signed a cooperation agreement with Microsoft covering cloud services, cybersecurity, and AI — signalling closer ties in how government data and systems may be managed going forward.

With the FIFA World Cup approaching, scammers are already targeting Australians with fake ticketing, streaming, and merchandise offers. Be cautious of unsolicited emails or messages promoting World Cup deals.

**Tip:** If you receive a World Cup-related offer that seems too good to be true, go directly to the official FIFA website rather than clicking any links.

featured.title: Microsoft, Australian Government sign MOU on cloud, cybersecurity and AI cooperation
featured.quote: Microsoft-Australian Government cybersecurity cooperation signals strategic national security alignment and capability building.
